title: Sulfadiazine fails to eliminate Wolbachia but restore entirely arrhenotokous and bisexual reproduction in thelytokous Trichogramma pretiosum (Hymenoptera: Trichogrammatidae)
author: Xiaofang He
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Through curing experiments (antibiotics and high temperature), crossing experiments, and high-throughput 16S ribosomal RNA sequencing (rRNA-seq), we investigated the role of  Wolbachia  in reproductive biology of three thelytokous  Trichogramma  spp ( T. pretiosum ,  T.   cacoeciae,  and  T. embryopha  gum ).
steps_raw: Through curing experiments (antibiotics and high temperature), crossing experiments, and high-throughput 16S ribosomal RNA sequencing (rRNA-seq), we investigated the role of  Wolbachia  in reproductive biology of three thelytokous  Trichogramma  spp ( T. pretiosum ,  T.   cacoeciae,  and  T. embryopha  gum ).
